repos.name: JavaScript Interview Questions
repos.bestFor: Fast JavaScript recall and interview gap checks
repos.whyIncluded: The broadest maintained open JavaScript interview Q&A set in the library.

repos.name: React Interview Questions
repos.bestFor: React fundamentals through advanced rendering behavior
repos.whyIncluded: Pairs concise answers with unusually broad React interview coverage.

repos.name: Frontend Interview Handbook
repos.bestFor: Frontend-specific coding, trivia, and system design interviews
repos.whyIncluded: A maintained, role-specific handbook with stronger frontend depth than general guides.

repos.name: System Design
repos.description: System design fundamentals and case studies
repos.bestFor: A structured first pass through distributed systems
repos.whyIncluded: Explains the complete system design vocabulary in a coherent learning sequence.

repos.name: System Design 101
repos.description: Visual system design explanations by ByteByteGo
repos.bestFor: Visual explanations of production architecture patterns
repos.whyIncluded: High-signal diagrams make abstract distributed-system tradeoffs easier to retain.

repos.name: Awesome Low-Level Design
repos.bestFor: Design patterns and low-level design case studies
repos.whyIncluded: Combines pattern references, UML, and practical interview problems in one source.

repos.name: Grokking OOP Design
repos.bestFor: Working through classic OOP interview cases
repos.whyIncluded: Provides a compact bridge from object-oriented principles to complete designs.

repos.name: DevOps Exercises
repos.description: 2600+ DevOps exercises covering all major topics
repos.bestFor: Active recall across Linux, cloud, containers, and operations
repos.whyIncluded: The library's deepest hands-on operations question bank.

repos.name: Coding Interview Patterns
repos.description: 101 coding problems by ByteByteGo in 6 languages
repos.whyIncluded: Organizes solutions by reusable interview pattern instead of an unstructured problem list.

repos.name: OOD Interview
repos.description: 11 OOP design projects with runnable Java code
repos.bestFor: Reading and running complete Java object-design projects
repos.whyIncluded: Turns common OOD prompts into concrete implementations, tests, and UML.

repos.name: System Design Primer
repos.description: Learn large-scale system design with Anki flashcards
repos.bestFor: Deep system design study and spaced-repetition review
repos.whyIncluded: A canonical open curriculum spanning fundamentals, tradeoffs, and worked designs.

repos.name: JavaScript Algorithms
repos.description: Algorithms and data structures in JavaScript
repos.bestFor: Learning algorithms from explanations, diagrams, and JavaScript
repos.whyIncluded: Every major data structure and algorithm has a readable explanation and implementation.

repos.name: Tech Interview Handbook
repos.description: Focused coding, behavioral, resume, and interview preparation
repos.bestFor: Planning the complete software engineering interview loop
repos.whyIncluded: Fills behavioral, resume, and interview-strategy gaps not covered by technical repositories.

repos.name: Project-Based Learning
repos.description: Curated programming tutorials organized around building real projects
repos.bestFor: Turning reading into portfolio-scale implementation practice
repos.whyIncluded: Adds applied build-based learning across languages without duplicating interview Q&A.
